stale_warning: STALE if generated_at is older than 720 minutes.
source_rule: Medulla V0 is one Node process using Chokidar only. It does not call AI, route autonomously, or execute packet commands.

current_frontier.title: Turn inbox packets into receipts and Top 3 Moves.
current_frontier.summary: Medulla watches tinkerden/inbox/*.json, validates packets, writes ACK/BLOCKER receipts, and surfaces pending operator decisions.

cards.mission: MEDULLA V0 test: produce ACK receipt and pending operator recommendation card.
cards.recommended_next_action: Return ACK / BLOCKER / ARTIFACT for medulla_test_valid_20260627180552.
cards.move: MEDULLA V0 test: produce ACK receipt and pending operator recommendation card.
cards.why_now: A valid inbox packet arrived and needs visible operator-facing handling.
cards.recommended_because: Medulla V0 only surfaces the next inspectable action; it does not execute the packet.

cards.move: Use the command inbox as the first TinkerDen command surface.
cards.why_now: The command surface already writes a packet, verifies a receiver hash read, and displays an ACK receipt.
cards.recommended_because: It reduces mule labor without treating sender-side write as delivery proof.

scoring_basis.formula: operator_facing*18 + file_backed*18 + receipt_visible*18 + scope_small*16 - risk_penalty*20 - min(PROCEED,3)*2
